name: say-it-right
title: Say It Right
description: Analyze selected English text for stress, intonation, rhythm; hear a model reading.
author: xianwei_zhang

commands.name: analyze-selection
commands.title: Analyze Selection
commands.subtitle: Say It Right
commands.description: Analyze the selected English text for stress, intonation, and rhythm.

commands.name: practice-sentence
commands.title: Practice a Sentence
commands.subtitle: Say It Right
commands.description: Type or paste an English sentence to see how to say it.

preferences.name: defaultAnalysisProvider
preferences.title: Analysis Provider
preferences.description: Preferred provider when multiple API keys are set. If only one key is filled, that provider is used automatically.

preferences.name: openaiApiKey
preferences.title: OpenAI API Key
preferences.description: Used for OpenAI analysis and TTS.

preferences.name: qwenApiKey
preferences.title: Qwen (DashScope) API Key
preferences.description: Used for Qwen analysis and TTS.

preferences.name: qwenAnalysisModel
preferences.title: Qwen Analysis Model
preferences.description: Qwen chat model used for analysis.

preferences.name: qwenAnalysisBaseURL
preferences.title: Qwen Analysis Base URL
preferences.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible base URL for Qwen ANALYSIS only, e.g. Alibaba Token Plan: https://token-plan.cn-beijing.maas.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 . Empty = standard DashScope endpoint. TTS always uses the standard API.

preferences.name: qwenAnalysisApiKey
preferences.title: Qwen Analysis API Key
preferences.description: Optional separate key for Qwen ANALYSIS (e.g. a Token Plan sk-sp-… key). Falls back to the main Qwen key if empty. TTS always uses the main Qwen key.

preferences.name: qwenTtsVoice
preferences.title: Qwen TTS Voice
preferences.description: Voice for Qwen TTS (all support English).

preferences.name: geminiApiKey
preferences.title: Gemini API Key
preferences.description: Google AI Studio key for Gemini analysis. Analysis only — Gemini does not do TTS here.

preferences.name: geminiAnalysisModel
preferences.title: Gemini Analysis Model
preferences.description: Gemini chat model for analysis. Default gemini-3.5-flash (best balance). For maximum accuracy try gemini-3.1-pro-preview; for always-latest use gemini-flash-latest.

preferences.name: mimoApiKey
preferences.title: MiMo (Xiaomi) API Key
preferences.description: Xiaomi MiMo key (tp-… for Token Plan, sk-… for pay-as-you-go). Used for MiMo analysis and TTS.

preferences.name: mimoBaseURL
preferences.title: MiMo Base URL
preferences.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL. Pay-as-you-go: https://api.xiaomimimo.com/v1 (default). Token Plan: token-plan-{cn,sgp,ams}.xiaomimimo.com/v1 (see your 订阅管理 page).

preferences.name: mimoAnalysisModel
preferences.title: MiMo Analysis Model
preferences.description: MiMo chat model for analysis (thinking is disabled for speed/determinism).

preferences.name: loopCount
preferences.title: Shadowing Loop Count
preferences.description: How many times the Shadowing Loop repeats the sentence.

preferences.name: loopGap
preferences.title: Shadowing Loop Gap (seconds)
preferences.description: Pause between repeats in the Shadowing Loop.
